result.stdout:
USAGE: smite [--help] --input-file <string> --output-folder <string>
             --lang <fsharp|csharp|visualbasic|typescript>
             [--field <field|property>]

OPTIONS:

    --input-file <string> Input YAML file
    --output-folder <string>
                          Output Folder for model sources files to be generated
                          in.
    --lang <fsharp|csharp|visualbasic|typescript>
                          Supported Programming Language
    --field <field|property>
                          Filed structure kind
    --help                display this list of options.
